title: made an AI trading Analyst, works on crypto, forex, US stocks, and commodities. ( Free For All)
author: Holiday-Ad-8921
selftext:
Hi everyone. it is my pleasure to finally share with you what I've been working on for a long time.

The name is Kyros, basically an AI wrapper dedicated to trading and analyzing all the symbols on Crypto, Forex, and Wall Street. 

Everytime you Prompt it to analyze a symbol, the data pipeline fetches fresh data, the modules calculate all the indicators on multiple timeframes, do the whole forecasting math, and serve the LLM with all of it to connect the dots, then answer your query with data driven precision.

the result comes out to be a deep holistic report about the current market situations, and an unbiased view of your opinion against the raging market.  the edge that it gives, although subjective to all users, is that of clarity of both the favorable and the unfavorable probabilities, which makes you ready to deal with whatever market throws at you. 

It is Free for all.  I'm looking forward to hearing your feedback about it, a lot of work still needs to be done, maybe even narrowing it down to a single asset class, and adding a few tools for the LLM to use to reduce the token usage, btw if anyone is interested in building it together or trying some ideas on it, please reach out.  

Do check the bot out!  

Its live on telegram by the name @ Datamonkey\_bot

Link : [https://t.me/Datamonkey\_bot?start=\_tgr\_ZuK0gJAwYjBl](https://t.me/Datamonkey_bot?start=_tgr_ZuK0gJAwYjBl)

Cheers!
